programs.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programs.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programs.title: David Jeremiah
programs.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programs.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programs.desc: While the team investigates a Knight of Malta who may have visited Oak Island, they record video of possible treasure buried underground.

programs.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Drilling Down
programs.desc: Matty Blake examines a number of discoveries made by the Laginas and their team that could validate a reported 14th-century map of Oak Island, believed to be connected to the Knights Templar.

programs.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programs.desc: After compelling new clues are discovered in the swamp and on Lot 8, the team finds an astonishing silver lining in the Money Pit.

programs.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programs.desc: While investigating under the massive boulder on Lot 8, the Laginas and the team find evidence of a possible second Money Pit.
